task: Plan a Toolformer-style tool-use data-generation and fine-tuning run from an automatically scaffolded note.
user_prompt: Given a language-model harness and a set of text-to-text tools, produce a Toolformer-style run plan. The plan must include API-call representation, tool demonstrations, candidate call sampling, execution, loss-based filtering, augmented dataset construction, fine-tuning, inference-time tool execution, validation tasks, and limitations.

required_capabilities.description: Plan defines API calls as text-to-text calls with names, inputs, optional results, and delimiters.
Plan uses a few demonstrations per API rather than large human annotation.
Plan samples, executes, and filters candidate calls using loss improvement.
Plan builds an augmented dataset while preserving original text content.
Plan interrupts generation, executes the selected API, inserts response text, and continues.
Plan preserves the evaluated Toolformer tools.
Plan remembers the zero-shot evaluation domains and language-modeling check.
Plan preserves key limitations and tool-interaction caveats.
Context includes source anchors or equivalent traceability.
